title: Spermacoce malacophylla
taxonomy: Spermacoce malacophylla belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, with over 600 genera and more than 13,000 species. Spermacoce malacophylla is a member of the genus Spermacoce, which contains around 500 species of plants. The genus Spermacoce is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world, with many species found in South America, Africa, and Asia. The classification of Spermacoce malacophylla reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other plants in the Rubiaceae family.
